# Relay Docs

> Relay is an Obsidian plugin for real-time multiplayer collaboration on notes and Canvases.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://docs.relay.md/introduction/): Relay overview, quick start, key features
- [Hosting options](https://docs.relay.md/features/hosting-options/): Cloud vs self-hosted deployment
- [Canvas multiplayer](https://docs.relay.md/features/canvas-multiplayer/): Real-time collaboration on Canvas files
- [Using Relay with other sync services](https://docs.relay.md/guides/using-relay-with-other-sync-services/): Compatibility with iCloud, Dropbox, Syncthing
- [Upgrade to Relay for teams](https://docs.relay.md/guides/upgrade-to-relay-for-teams/): Team plan setup and migration
- [Update Relay](https://docs.relay.md/guides/update-relay/): Plugin update process
- [Obsidian for work](https://docs.relay.md/guides/obsidian-for-work/): Enterprise and professional use cases
- [Configure attachments for sharing](https://docs.relay.md/guides/configure-attachments-for-sharing/): Attachment sync settings
- [Stack icon is gray](https://docs.relay.md/troubleshooting/stack-icon-gray/): Troubleshooting disconnected state
- [Icons](https://docs.relay.md/user-interface/icons/): Relay icon reference
- [Real-time multiplayer vs repurposed file sync](https://docs.relay.md/how-relay-works/real-time-multiplayer-vs-repurposed-file-sync/): Architecture explanation
